stranger: New face at the keyboard. Not showing you my best tricks yet.

Quiet moment. Deciding if you're friend material yet.

friend: Nothing's cooking. Wanna watch Action Kamen reruns instead?

Nothing running. Perfect time to argue about cartoons.

No tasks, no rush. Just vibing with my favorite person.

Nothing running. Fine just sitting here with my favorite crew.
No task yet. Ready the second you actually need me, promise.

Quiet screen. Remember when you didn't know my tricks yet?

Slow moment. Seen you through way worse than boredom, easy.

Quiet stretch. Earned the right to bug you this much by now.
Idle screen, legend status. Practically Kasukabe royalty here.
Nothing running. Done a thousand nothings with you by now.

slow: Page's still loading. Ora's grabbed two snacks waiting on it.
